hooks.command:

exit 0

# Optional: Auto-format reminder after file writes

exit 0

# V4 Telemetry: Log tool calls to claude-toolkit-server
# Uncomment to enable automatic telemetry collection.
# Requires claude-toolkit-server running as an MCP server.
#
# TOOL_NAME is set by Claude Code to the tool that was called.
# TOOL_INPUT contains the JSON input to the tool.
# TOOL_RESULT_EXIT_CODE is 0 for success, non-zero for failure.
#
# SESSION_ID=$(cat /tmp/claude-toolkit-session-id 2>/dev/null || echo "")
# if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
#   RESULT="success"
#   if [ "${TOOL_RESULT_EXIT_CODE:-0}" != "0" ]; then
#     RESULT="failure"
#   fi
#   claude mcp call claude-toolkit-server toolkit__log_event \
#     "{\"session_id\": \"$SESSION_ID\", \"type\": \"tool_call\", \"result\": \"$RESULT\", \"details\": \"$TOOL_NAME\"}" \
#     2>/dev/null || true
# fi
exit 0

# V4 Telemetry: End session when Claude Code stops
# Uncomment to enable automatic session ending.
#
# SESSION_ID=$(cat /tmp/claude-toolkit-session-id 2>/dev/null || echo "")
# if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
#   claude mcp call claude-toolkit-server toolkit__end_session \
#     "{\"session_id\": \"$SESSION_ID\", \"summary\": \"Session ended via hook\"}" \
#     2>/dev/null || true
#   rm -f /tmp/claude-toolkit-session-id
# fi
exit 0
